sub_pixel_system.notes: Not a character-based platformer; simulation game with track-based physics

special_mechanics.name: Roller Coaster Physics
special_mechanics.description: Game simulates physics of roller coasters and thrill rides on constructed tracks. Players design custom coasters with spline-based system (introduced in RCT World). Mechanics involve track construction, ride simulation, and coaster dynamics rather than character movement.

tier_notes: Tier 2: RollerCoaster Tycoon is a construction and management simulation game, not a character platformer. No player character movement physics, gravity, or jump mechanics are documented. The game focuses on amusement park management and roller coaster design with track-based physics simulation. Sources provide game release information and feature descriptions but no quantified physics parameters for character movement.
